segments.text: I think they're about even in terms of character power though
segments.original_text: キャラパワーは同じくらいだと思うんですけど
意外とパジュニは強いらしいけど

segments.text: I mean, I think it's strong myself too, honestly
segments.original_text: 強いらしいというか俺も強いと思ってるんだけど

full_text: I think they're about even in terms of character power though Pretty contrasting matchups though Apparently Pajuni's pretty strong I mean, I think it's strong myself too, honestly Buff
